task.title: Simplify Control Room second-screen UI
task.summary: Refine the Control Room and compact status panel around high-signal second-screen use: Status, Product, System, Board, and Graph only, with system diagrams backed by agent-editable YAML raw data.

goal.outcome: Users get a simpler high-signal CodeWiki UI for second-screen use beside chat, with top-level Status/Product/System/Board/Graph and source-backed diagram rendering.
acceptance: Top-level Control Room navigation is limited to Status, Product, System, Board, and Graph; Knowledge, Builds, Validation, Diff, and Settings are removed from permanent first-level navigation or moved behind contextual/command-palette access.

Home is renamed Status and shows only compact project metrics/statistics: health, focus, next action, task counts, claims/conflicts, gates/blockers, drift/stale counts, graph counts, and latest check/validation signal when available.
Product view curates `.codewiki/kb/product/**` raw Markdown into source-backed users, stories, and UI cards/relationships instead of showing raw Markdown as the primary UX.

System view reads a diagram catalog from `.codewiki/kb/system/diagrams/**`, renders/selects the five core diagram families where feasible for the first slice, and keeps selected details source-backed by component Markdown/docs.
Board and Graph emphasize roadmap work mapping: active task/sprint scope, gates, blockers, acceptance, closure evidence, graph relationships around work, drift, and reconciliation cues.
Compact status panel mirrors the simplified section model and only surfaces diff/build/validation/settings details when contextually relevant.
UI state remains read/API-backed and does not create hidden canonical truth.
Typecheck, architecture check, smoke tests, and relevant UI assertions pass.
non_goals: No hosted service or shared server mode.
No full Markdown editor or diagram editor.
No removal of underlying CodeWiki APIs/tools for builds, validation, diff tables, claims, or settings.
No direct hand-editing of generated graph state.
No broad frontend framework migration unless separately approved.
verification: Manual or smoke launch of `/wiki-ui` proving simplified navigation and source-backed views.

summary: Implemented TASK-067 simplified Control Room second-screen UI and compact status panel.

evidence: Updated control-room smoke to cover Product API extraction, System diagram YAML catalog, Board API tasks, simplified nav, and absence of deprecated top-level sections.
Updated package smoke expectations for Status tab naming, compact status metrics, and System diagram catalog.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Web Control Room now has Status/Product/System/Board/Graph sections, local APIs for Product and Board, YAML-backed diagram catalog and renderer, and Graph work-scope filtering.
Pi status panel tab labels/cycle and /wiki-status command aliases now match simplified surface.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Updated control-room smoke to cover Product API extraction, System diagram YAML catalog, Board API tasks, simplified nav, and absence of deprecated top-level sections.
Updated package smoke expectations for Status tab naming, compact status metrics, and System diagram catalog.
code_change_evidence: Web Control Room now has Status/Product/System/Board/Graph sections, local APIs for Product and Board, YAML-backed diagram catalog and renderer, and Graph work-scope filtering.
Pi status panel tab labels/cycle and /wiki-status command aliases now match simplified surface.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Top-level Control Room navigation is limited to Status, Product, System, Board, and Graph; deprecated sections are not permanent nav.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Control Room HTML now renders only data-view=status/product/system/board/graph; smoke test asserts deprecated diff/builds/validation/settings/knowledge nav is absent.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Home is renamed Status and shows compact metrics/statistics.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Web Status view renders health, roadmap counts, claims, graph drift/stale, gates, focus, and next action; Pi tab label is Status and renderHomeTab was simplified to compact metrics.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Product curates product Markdown into source-backed users/stories/UI cards.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added /api/product and buildControlRoomProductModel; Product view renders categorized cards with source paths and inspector previews; control-room smoke covers users and UI extraction.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: System reads diagram catalog from .codewiki/kb/system/diagrams/** and renders selectable source-backed diagrams.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added js-yaml diagram loader, /api/system diagram_catalog/diagrams, generic diagram renderer/picker, and Pi diagram catalog; smoke creates component-map.yaml and asserts loaded diagram nodes.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Board and Graph emphasize roadmap work mapping.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added /api/board and Board view over roadmap tasks/acceptance/verification/source paths; Graph defaults to work scope and filters roadmap/build/validation/evidence/task nodes.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Compact status panel mirrors simplified model and contextualizes details.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Status panel tabs are Status/Product/System/Board/Graph; /wiki-status accepts status/board aliases and no longer advertises/enters Diff through tab cycle; Diff tooling remains intact.
Control Room reads /api/state, /api/product, /api/system, /api/board, /api/graph and does not add UI-only canonical writes.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Typecheck, architecture check, smoke tests, and UI assertions pass.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: npx tsc --noEmit, node scripts/check-architecture.mjs, node tests/smoke/control-room.test.mjs, node tests/smoke/efficiency-ui.test.mjs, and npm test passed.

closure_brief.user_intent: Simplify CodeWiki UI for high signal-to-noise second-screen use beside chat.
implemented_changes: Renamed Home surface to Status and reduced it to compact project metrics/statistics.
Limited Control Room first-level navigation to Status, Product, System, Board, and Graph.
Added Product API/view that curates users, stories, and UI Markdown into source-backed cards.
Added System diagram YAML catalog under `.codewiki/kb/system/diagrams/**` as the UI rendering source and rendered selectable diagrams.
Added Board API/view for roadmap work, acceptance, verification, and source paths.
Changed Graph to default to work-centered scope around roadmap/build/validation/evidence relationships.
Updated Pi status panel tabs and /wiki-status aliases to mirror the simplified model.
Updated smoke tests and package smoke expectations.
acceptance_evidence: All TASK-067 acceptance criteria mapped to implementation evidence in this build.
non_goals_preserved: No hosted service or shared server mode.
No full Markdown editor or diagram editor.
Underlying CodeWiki APIs/tools for builds, validation, diff tables, claims, and settings remain.
No direct edits to generated graph state by UI.
remaining_risks: TASK-068 remains open and unrelated; later work may touch overlapping graph/GC files.

risks: Worktree contains unrelated open TASK-068 and unrelated file changes from other/current sessions; TASK-067 evidence is scoped to Control Room/status files and tests.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.
